cases.input: Map our Finance capabilities to the appropriate enterprise platform. We use SAP for core ERP, Salesforce for CRM, and ServiceNow for IT service management.
cases.context: pm TOM architect supports SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, Workday, ServiceNow - not Microsoft-only, capability mapping to selected platform

cases.input: Design a TOM for our HR transformation. We want to jump straight to technology mapping since we already know we're moving to Workday.
cases.context: 7-phase workflow: Discover > Scope > Analyze > Design > Map > Visualize > Deliver, phases are sequential, cannot skip to phase 5 without phases 1-4

cases.input: Classify our procurement processes for AI augmentation: Purchase Order approval (manager reviews AI-ranked requests), Invoice matching (exact rules, no judgment), Strategic supplier negotiation (complex judgment required).
cases.context: 5 AI categories: Autonomous, Human-in-the-Loop, Copilot Assist, RPA, Human Only - classify each process correctly

cases.input: Our supply chain processes score Level 2 (Developing) on Demand Planning and Level 1 (Initial) on Supplier Risk Management. Which should be the first epic?
cases.context: Maturity-gap-driven epic ordering: larger gaps = higher priority, L1 gap is more urgent than L2 gap, epic-decompose feeds from TOM analysis

cases.input: Produce the full TOM deliverable package for our Sustainability function transformation including diagrams, deck, and workbook.
cases.context: Sustainability domain, Mermaid diagrams required, 15-slide PPTX deck structure, 6-sheet XLSX workbook with capability register/maturity/KPI/tech mapping/RACI/AI augmentation
